[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01001011 4
1 01100011 4
2 10111110 6
3 11111111 a
4 10000001 2
5 10100000 2
6 01111011 6
7 01100011 4

01 10 00111101 5
12 21 00101000 2
23 32 11011101 6
34 43 01000001 2
45 54 01111110 6
56 65 01010111 5
67 76 11100110 5
70 07 01000110 3

02 20 00010101 3
13 31 11110101 6
24 42 10011100 4
35 53 00111111 6
46 64 00101001 3
57 75 10110001 4
60 06 10100000 2 match 5
71 17 01111011 6 match 6

03 30 11001000 3
14 41 10110100 4
25 52 11100010 4
36 63 01101000 3
47 74 11001111 6
50 05 11110111 7
61 16 10011101 5
72 27 01010011 4

04 40 10001001 3
15 51 11001010 4
26 62 10110101 5
37 73 10001110 4
